# HttpServerHandle

> **Transport Layer**

Defined in: [src/app/transport/http/http-transport.ts:190](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/transport/http/http-transport.ts#L190)

Handle returned by [startHttpServer](../functions/startHttpServer.md) for lifecycle control of the
underlying `node:http` server and its active MCP session transports.

## Remarks

Callers receive this handle after the HTTP server is listening.  It
provides two capabilities:

- **Graceful shutdown** via [close()](#property-close) —
  iterates every active [NodeStreamableHTTPServerTransport](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) in the
  internal [TransportMap](#), closes them, then shuts down the TCP
  listener.  This ensures in-flight SSE streams and pending responses
  are terminated cleanly.

- **Address introspection** via [address()](#property-address) —
  returns the bound [AddressInfo](https://nodejs.org/api/) (host, port, family), which is
  especially useful when the server was started on ephemeral port `0`
  (common in tests).

## Properties

| Property                                | Type                                                                                         | Description                                                                                                                                                                               | Defined in                                                                                                                                                                          |
| --------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| <a id="property-close"></a> `close`     | () => [`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`void`> | Closes every active [NodeStreamableHTTPServerTransport](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk), clears the internal session map, and shuts down the TCP listener.        | [src/app/transport/http/http-transport.ts:197](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/transport/http/http-transport.ts#L197) |
| <a id="property-address"></a> `address` | () => [`AddressInfo`](https://nodejs.org/api/) \| `null`                                     | Returns the network address the server is bound to, or `null` if the server returned a UNIX socket path string (not applicable here but part of the Node.js `Server.address()` contract). | [src/app/transport/http/http-transport.ts:206](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/transport/http/http-transport.ts#L206) |
